---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behaviour:
1. Config used (paste relevant sections — remove personal data)
2. Command run: `python maps_scraper.py --mode ...`
3. Error message or unexpected output

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- Playwright version: [run `pip show playwright`]
- Browser channel: [chrome / chromium — from your config.yaml]

## Log output
Paste the relevant lines from `logs/scrape_YYYYMMDD.log`.

```
paste log here
```

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem.
